name: reproducible_agent_environment
description: Reproducible Agent Environment plugins for consistent AI-assisted development

plugins.name: rae
plugins.description: Reproducible Agent Environment: 27 skills for coding standards enforcement, quality gates, repo scaffolding, repo auditing, golden/parity test harnesses, semi-formal code reasoning, GitHub activity review, JAX memory/retracing diagnosis, JAX JIT/fusion hygiene, efficient rendering, and domain-specific development (biomechanics, DataJoint, gait analysis, camera models)
